'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 10''' was the tenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 6]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Darren Allanson]], [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], and [[Iain Lowson]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Battle of Tatooine (Galactic Civil War)|The Hunt for the Droids]] {{C|HUN 1-4}}
**<small>The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] spared no effort to recapture the stolen plans for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].</small>
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] {{C|KEN 1-4}}
**<small>The early years of the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who helped to overthrow the Empire.</small>
*[[Alliance Army/Legends|Rebel Troops]] {{C|REB 5-8}}
**<small>The Fighting Forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] had to adapt to many theatres of war.</small>
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] {{C|END 1-4}}
**<small>Natural live of the arboreal world that became a famous battleground.</small>
*[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] {{C|ART 1-2}}
**<small>The versatile abilities of this atromech droid proved vital to the Rebellion.</small>
*[[Datapad/Legends|Datapads]] {{C|DAT 1-2}}
**<small>One of the Most familiar tools in the galaxy for processing information.</small>
*[[N-1 starfighter/Legends|Naboo N-1 Starfighter]] {{C|NAB 3-4}}
**<small>Sleek, sophisticated and agile craft that helped win the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].</small>
